title: RouteDecisionResult
description: Canonical runtime-owned route decision surface derived from TruthSurface for a single step.

mode.description: The bounded route mode selected by the runtime for this step.

status.description: Whether a route was selected or the step was refused.

reason.description: Human-inspectable explanation of why this route result occurred.

reason_code.description: Stable machine-readable reason code for tooling and tests.

fallback_allowed.description: Whether policy allowed the runtime to consider fallback beyond the local path.

fallback_used.description: Whether the runtime used fallback or hybrid support for this step.

fallback_refused.description: Whether a fallback path was explicitly refused.

refusal.description: Structured refusal details when no route may proceed.

kind.description: Why the runtime refused the route.

learned_effect_allowed.description: Whether a refused step may still contribute to future learning surfaces.
